intentSynonyms: look up category members in wikipedia
fetch a single category members in wikipedia
view one specific category members in wikipedia
list pages in a category in wikipedia
description: Get the pages that belong to a specific Wikipedia category. Returns article titles. The category name should include the "Category:" prefix (e.g., "Category:Programming languages").

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to return (default 50, max 500)

type.description: Type of category members to return (default: "page"). "subcat" for subcategories, "file" for files
